channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Emberville – The MIX and Kinda Funny Spring Game Showcase 2026 trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Amelia Tyler joins the cast.

Cygnus Cross has released a new gameplay trailer for action adventure RPG Emberville, as well as announced that Amelia Tyler will join the voice cast.

Tyler is known for her previous roles as the narrator in Baldur’s Gate III, Hecate from Hades II, Elena Nightingale from Warframe, and many other characters.

The new trailer showcases a brief look at character customization, extended combat sequences, the inventory and character stats screen, and a new non-playable character.

Emberville is due out in Early Access for PC via Steam this summer.

Watch the trailer below.

The MIX and Kinda Funny Spring Game Showcase 2026 Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/emberville-the-mix-and-kinda-funny-spring-game-showcase-2026-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ARTIUS: Pure Imagination demo now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Four stages with an estimated playtime of one-to-two hours.

Publisher IndieArk and developer PVic Games have released a new demo for 2D action platformer ARTIUS: Pure Imagination for PC via Steam.

The demo features four stages with an estimated playtime of one-to-two hours. “Players will dash through tension-filled, stylized streets at breakneck speed, experiencing an adrenaline-fueled artistic spectacle all its own,” reads the press release.

Here is a brief overview of the game, via IndieArk:

At its core, ARTIUS: Pure Imagination is a high-octane 2D platformer built around four distinct artists, each armed with their own signature abilities. In a world drained of inspiration with creativity teetering on the edge of collapse, players must chain together jumps, dashes, and attacks to blast through obstacles, race to the finish, and push back against the forces threatening to snuff out the last ember of artistic expression.

Inspired by the everyday life and culture of the developers’ home country of Brazil, ARTIUS carries a rich South American cultural and artistic spirit. The game features a distinctive “lo-fi” pixel-meets-cartoon illustration art style — bold lines, vivid colors, and boundless imagination, all wrapped in a nostalgic, humorous package.

Watch a new trailer below.

Gameplay Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/artius-pure-imagination-demo-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: SiN: Reloaded launches in 2026 for PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox One
  • Xbox Series

2020-announced remaster resurfaces.

SiN: Reloaded, the 2020-announced remastered version of the 1998-released first-person shooter, will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store in 2026, publishers 3D Realms and Nightdive Studios, and developers Nightdive Studios, Slipgate Ironworks, and Ritual Entertainment announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

From Nightdive Studios, SiN: Reloaded is a completely remastered experience of the 1998 shooter from Ritual Entertainment. This diamond-in-the-rough, story-driven FPS features memorable characters, horrific enemies, and a devastating arsenal that pushed the Quake II Engine to its limits.

Enter a near-future dystopian world as security consultant Colonel John R. Blade as you take on the seductively evil Doctor Elexis Sinclaire. When Elexis, the CEO of SinTEK Industries, begins injecting the streets with a DNA-altering drug, it’s time to reassess the laws of morality. As Blade, you’ve made a religion out of fighting crime. Now you’re going to make Elexis pay for her sins by taking on her unholy army of genetically-engineered mutants.

SiN was celebrated for introducing a groundbreaking amount of interactivity in every level. Hack your way into computer terminals using DOS-style code, use elevators and security cameras to wreak havoc, you can even zip around in a forklift, patrol boat and a helicopter. Your actions have consequences, creating branching paths as the game progresses. SiN also helped to pioneer the ability to knock weapons out of an opponent’s hands and take area-specific damage from their attacks.

SiN: Reloaded includes the Wages of SiN extra mission pack, where you take on a diabolical mafia boss with a new army of dangerous mutants. Both games have been optimized using the KEX Engine to play on modern systems. The graphics throughout have been beautifully remastered with new textures, control schemes have been modernized, and maps have been improved with Nightdive’s established precision.

Key Features

  • Play the original SiN and the SiN: Wages of Sin extra mission pack, optimized using the KEX Engine.
  • Beautifully remastered graphics with HD textures and models, (up to) 4K resolution at 144 frames per second, anti-aliasing, and upgraded 2D screens and menu art.
  • Overhauled control schemes and modernized user interface.
  • Improved maps throughout the game.
  • Swap between remastered visuals and the original SiN Gold version.
  • Brand-new achievements.
  • Higher resolution Zak Belika tracks mixed / engineered by Chris Mock.

Watch a new trailer below.

Re-Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/sin-reloaded-launches-in-2026-for-ps5-xbox-series-ps4-xbox-one-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime launches March 16
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

Frog-obsessed comedy adventure dated.

Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime will launch for Switch and PC via Steam on March 16 for $16.99, publisher offbrand games and developer Bonte Avond announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via offbrand games:

About

Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime is a frog-obsessed comedy adventure featuring tactical frog battles, bizarre quests, and the mother of all frogs: the motherfrogger.

This story revolves around the frog-hopping tactical battler Frogtime. Collect, buy and trade frogs and use them to build an unbeatable roster.

Embark on a quest to defeat the local bully, and get sidetracked—play music, infiltrate a beehive (disguised as a bee), and maybe get in a sled race with a vampire.

Fully voice acted by us and our friends but also features a number of surprising special guests.

Grab your toadbag, count those cocoduds, and explore a gently absurd world where everything is resolved with frog battles.

Key Features

  • A bear in a frog onesie.
  • A giant skeleton man.
  • A normal sized skeleton man.
  • At least 12 heartfelt moments about the importance of community and what it means to have self-worth.
  • You can put hats on the frogs.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/bonnie-bear-saves-frogtime-launches-march-16
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The King is Watching DLC ‘Crowns of History’ launches March 16
item.content:encoded:
Roguelite strategy game The King is Watching downloadable content “Crowns of History” will launch on March 16 for $4.99, publisher tinyBuild and developer Hypnohead announced.

“From humble beginnings winning third place at a game jam, to securing 500,000 sales following launch, The King is Watching has clearly resonated with fans around the world,” said Hypnohead head of studio Semyon Itmaniuk in a press release. “‘The Crowns of History’ [downloadable content] brings key historical kings and queens to life, offering a distinctly fun way to step into their royal shoes while also adding new layers of gameplay for people to enjoy.”

Here is an overview of the content, via tinyBuild:

Forge a pact with three visionaries of the past, desolating the realm in death, rebirth or pure maniacal power. Bow to Queen Cleopatrea, the Empress of Death, who raises armies from the dead to overwhelm antagonizing forces. Harvest canopy from fallen units to revive loyal Egyptian-inspired figures like Sphinxes, Jinns, Horus, and the fearsome Anubis Saber Masters. Cast Pharos Blessings, reanimating units and triggering explosive scarabs to annihilate armies in one fell swoop.

Kneel to the Master of Offensive Structures, Taizong of Tang, an emperor who turns fortifications into engines of destruction. Wield the power to repair and enhance offensive structures whose firepower relies on the trust of the people. Recruit expert Crossbowmen to defend castle walls at zero cost to unit limits. Summon lighting to wipe invaders with Divine Punishment, send your calvary to finish them off and dominate with the strength of the Tang Dynasty.

Give praise to Xerxes, The Glass Cannon King, whose demolishing force explodes enemy assaults at the cost of fragility. The Ephemeral Existence ability grants amplified damage to the detriment of a 90% health penalty. Cast Sands of Time to reset all unit ability cooldowns, teleport Immortals to target areas, and raise the most formidable yet delicate army.

The King is Watching is available now for PC via Steam.

Watch a new trailer below.

DLC “Crowns of History” Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/the-king-is-watching-dlc-crowns-of-history-launches-march-16
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Super Basketball Classics Featuring the World-Famous Harlem Globetrotters announced for consoles, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

From the studio behind Basketball Classics.

Publisher Acclaim and developer Namco Gamo have announced Super Basketball Classics, an old-school arcade basketball game featuring the Harlem Globetrotters, debuting in conjunction with the team’s 100th anniversary season. It will be available for unspecified consoles and PC via Steam.

“The Harlem Globetrotters are synonymous with basketball and entertainment,” said Acclaim CEO Alex Josef in a press release. “This game celebrates that spirit while honoring the classic arcade basketball experiences fans grew up loving while building a whole new generation of fans, for years to come. With tight controls, big personalities and instant pick-up-and-play action, Super Basketball Classics brings the Harlem Globetrotters legacy to gamers and sports fans around the world.”

Harlem Globetrotters and Herschend Entertainment Studios president Keith Dawkins added, “As we celebrate our centennial season the links that tie our vibrant past to popular culture of today continues to get stronger, and this partnership with Acclaim, literally brings this video game back to life for a new generation! It fits perfectly for what we are striving to achieve now and into the future, which is to create opportunities for fans of any age, anywhere in the world and on any device to learn and enjoy all aspects of the Harlem Globetrotters in whatever manner they choose. We can’t wait to play!”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via Acclaim:

About

From playground rivalries to cheat-code-style moves, Super Basketball Classics Featuring the World-Famous Harlem Globetrotters reimagines basketball as both competitive arcade action and pure spectacle. Whether players are running a full season, challenging friends head-to-head, or dazzling the crowd with over-the-top Globetrotter performances, every match is designed to feel like a show.

From the creators of Basketball Classics, this new installment keeps the heart of arcade basketball alive while infusing it with the unmistakable personality of the Harlem Globetrotters. Part sports sim, part arcade spectacle, Super Basketball Classics featuring the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters is a celebration of hoops culture, built for fans of retro games, basketball lovers and anyone who believes sports should be fun first.

Step up. Show off. And play ball the Harlem Globetrotters way.

Key Features

  • The Harlem Globetrotters Take the Court – Officially licensed and featuring the world-famous, Harlem Globetrotters, complete with signature moves, jaw-dropping trick shots, and unmistakable theatrical flair.
  • Retro Gameplay, Modern Upgrades – Inspired by classic arcade and console basketball titles, rebuilt with smoother controls, new animations, and modern competitive balancing.
  • Deep Modes of Play – Jump into quick Exhibition matches, take on a full Season Mode, or battle through Tournament play with branching brackets and high-stakes challenges.
  • Cooperative and Versus Action – Team up with a friend in couch co-op or go head-to-head for ultimate bragging rights.
  • Signature Trick Shot System – Pull off alley-oops, half-court bombs, outrageous dunks, and over-the-top moves straight out of a Globetrotters performance.
  • Retro-Future Nostalgia Aesthetic – Crisp pixel art, rotoscoped-style visual filters, and a soundtrack that blends classic arcade beats with modern flair.

Watch the announcement trailer and a gameplay video below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

Build Your Player



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/super-basketball-classics-featuring-the-world-famous-harlem-globetrotters-announced-for-consoles-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Kumitantei: Old-School Slaughter Episode 1 launches April 23
item.content:encoded:
Danganronpa-inspired murder mystery adventure game Kumitantei: Old-School Slaughter Episode 1 will launch for PC via Steam on April 23, publisher Akupara Games and developer Mango Factory announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Akupara Games:

About

Is survival in the cards?

Kumitantei: Old-School Slaughter is an episodic murder-mystery adventure cardbattler that lovingly fuses retro anime analog horror with killing game! Kumitantei will consist of six episodes, beginning to release in early 2026.

“The Empire of Japan, 1989… Awoken in a decaying old bunker, sixteen elite Absolute Students are trapped in a kill-or-be-killed Apathy Experiment. Will they band together to uncover secrets of this anemoic alternate past, or lose their humanity and lives in the present?”

With a visual style inspired by Rumiko Takahashi’s Urusei Yatsura and ’80s anime alongside classic Japanese mystery-adventure games like Danganronpa and Ace Attorney, Kumitantei thrusts you into a suspenseful character-driven killing game narrative where your deckbuilding and detective skills are the only keys to surviving. It’s a creepy-cute love letter to decades of adventure games that wears its many inspirations on its sleeve: perfect for fans of visual novels, detective games, and deckbuilders with deep narratives.

Key Features

  • Bond With Your Classmates! – Get to know the Absolute Class of ’89 by listening to them, giving them gifts, and receiving powerful cards to use during debates!
  • Investigate Grisly Murders – With cataclysm at the doorstep, unearth the twisting forgotten halls of the Nestrium. Hidden secrets lurk behind every nook, cranny, and hole in the wall, with only you to discover the wealth that lies within.
  • Survive the Trial! – Use your detective skills to comb through slain classmates’ crime scenes and take your evidence to trial!
  • Build Your Deck! – Create absolute combos using cards you find in the Bunker and through bonding with your classmates to dominate the debates and trials!
  • Earn Prizes with the Kitty Catcher – Easily bond with your new friends by giving them personalized gifts from the definitely-not-rigged Kitty Catcher!
  • Please Insert Coin! – Test your retro gaming skills in a variety of faithfully crafted anemoic riffs on true old-school arcade icons!

Watch a new trailer below.

Early Access Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/kumitantei-old-school-slaughter-episode-1-launches-april-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cast Outs ‘Overview’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Urban fantasy and co-op collide.

Twisted Works has released a two-minute overview trailer for modern-fantasy cooperative action game Cast Outs.

Here is an overview of the game, via Twisted Works:

About

Cast Outs brings you the pure spectacle of magic where spellcasting hits with the physical impact of a brawler and the immediate kick of a shooter. Dive into the ultimate magical urban battleground where you and your friends can truly cooperate, regardless of skill level. It’s the perfect balance of quick-fix fun and high-octane action, built to be played together.

Key Features

  • A New Standard for Magic Combat – Your powers hit with the impact of a brawler and the immediacy of a shooter, delivering a new standard for magical combat. Feel every strike, every blast, every synergy as your squad turns the city into an epic battleground.
  • True Cooperative Power – Alone you’re dangerous. Together you’re unstoppable. Discover endless ways your squad’s powers combine, creating unforgettable moments of synergy.
  • Evolving Heroes – Swap between unique heroes, each with evolving playstyles and strategies to master. Experiment, remix, and find your perfect team dynamic.
  • Unpredictable Runs – No two runs play the same. Power-shifting mutators and upgrades transform your abilities, keeping every battle fresh and unpredictable.
  • An Iconic London Under Siege – Orcs, ogres, wraiths, dragons. Face an onslaught across iconic London landmarks, defending your city against an invasion.
  • Blockbuster Sessions – 20 minutes or all night, Cast Outs delivers high-octane action, with zero grind, immediate fun, and endlessly replayable action built for friends.
  • Different Ways to Play – Fight back in two-, three-, or four-player cooperative play through combat runs, escort missions, horde survival, speed runs, and challenge modes.

Cast Outs is in development for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam. An early access beta test is planned for release in early 2027.

Watch the trailer below.

Overview Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/cast-outs-overview-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sigma Star Saga DX launches April 7
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch

Enhanced Game Boy Advance shoot 'em up RPG dated.

Cult classic shoot ’em up RPG Sigma Star Saga DX will launch for PlayStation 5, Switch, and PC via Steam on April 7, developer WayForward announced announced.

The game is an enhanced version of Sigma Star Saga, which was released for Game Boy Advance in 2005, running on Limited Run Games‘ Carbon Engine, with porting handled by Mighty Rabbit Studios. Limited Run Games will also handle distribution of physical editions for PlayStation 5 and Switch.

Here is an overview of the game, via WayForward:

About

Sigma Star Saga DX is a refined version of the unique 2005 adventure / RPG / shoot ’em up hybrid.

Originally published by Namco on Game Boy Advance, Sigma Star Saga is a genre-shattering science-fiction adventure that transitions from character-driven top-down exploration to real-time side-scrolling space-shooter action when battle begins. As elite Earth pilot Ian Recker, players must infiltrate the invading Krill empire and defeat them from within by traversing numerous planets, interacting with memorable NPCs, and wielding dozens of types of weapon data that allow for thousands of powerful combinations for Recker’s ship.

Newly updated for the game’s 20th anniversary, Sigma Star Saga DX retains all of the gameplay and content of the original release, but adds numerous refinements including an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, modified hit boxes, adjusted auto-fire, enhanced dialogue, additional save points, assorted bug fixes and quality-of-life updates, and more.

Key Features

  • The Game Boy Advance classic returns after 20 years!
  • Top-down RPG-style exploration mixed with action-packed space-shooter battles!
  • Survive as a double agent for the humans and the Krill, and discover the secret of the six planets
  • Stunning pixel-art graphics and fantastic soundtrack
  • Explore using tools like the Scanner, Krill Boots, Wings, and more
  • Customize your ship with more than 70 different Gun Data items yielding over 20,000 combinations
  • Branching story with multiple endings
  • The definitive DX version adds an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, updated script, various bug fixes, and other enhancements

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/sigma-star-saga-dx-launches-april-7
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
